agent.name: Virtuals Protocol
agent.description: AI agent launchpad on Base (Ethereum L2). No-code platform to create, tokenize, and deploy AI agents across DeFi, gaming, and social media.

keyFindings: Agent creation is functional and accessible.
Tokenization mechanics are transparent and functional on-chain.
Cross-platform operation is functional based on observable agent activity.
Revenue mechanics exist but the end-to-end path is not fully transparent.
Quality assurance is the platform's most critical failure.

trustExplanation: Mixed results: 3 skills passed, 2 need improvement.

recommendation.summary: Use with caution: safety concerns were identified during audit.
concerns: Agent quality assurance: Quality assurance is the platform's most critical failure.

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
